//Seed: Bootstrap administrator credentials are deliberately absent here. appsettings.json loads in EVERY environment, so a password in this file is a known-credential administrator on any public deployment. Development values live in appsettings.Development.json; elsewhere supply Seed__AdminEmail and Seed__AdminPassword as environment secrets.
//Smtp: Host is the switch: if Smtp:Host is empty, email falls back to the logging stub (see ERP.Infrastructure.DependencyInjection.AddNotifications). Smtp:Password is a secret and is deliberately absent here — supply it as the Smtp__Password environment variable in any deployed environment.
//AllowedHosts: Override with your deployment hostname (AllowedHosts env var) so the app rejects host-header spoofing.
